component.name: MainPage
component.script:
function init() m.top.backgroundColor = "0x07111EFF" m.navIndex = 0 m.blogsScrollY = 0
' FIX 1: Set focus to the LayoutGroup containing nav items ' This allows the nav items to receive focus m.top.findNode("navGroup").setFocus(true)
' Collect nav label references and set font size m.navItems = [ m.top.findNode("navHome"), m.top.findNode("navBlogs"), m.top.findNode("navLive") ] for each lbl in m.navItems lbl.font.size = 26 ' FIX 2: Make nav labels focusable so they can receive focus lbl.focusable = true end for
' ── Create the three pages below the nav bar ────────── m.homePage = m.top.createChild("HomePage") m.homePage.translation = [0, 71] m.homePage.visible = true
m.blogsPage = m.top.createChild("BlogsPage") m.blogsPage.translation = [0, 71] m.blogsPage.visible = false
m.livePage = m.top.createChild("LiveVideoPage") m.livePage.translation = [0, 71] m.livePage.visible = false m.livePage.observeField("requestClose", "onLiveClose")
m.pages = [m.homePage, m.blogsPage, m.livePage] updateNav() end function
' ── Highlight the active nav label ──────────────────────── sub updateNav() for i = 0 to m.navItems.count() - 1 if i = m.navIndex then m.navItems[i].color = "0x00c996FF" else m.navItems[i].color = "0x4A90E2FF" end if end for end sub
' ── Switch to a page by index (0=Home, 1=Blogs, 2=Live) ── sub showPage(index as Integer) if index = m.navIndex then return
' Stop live video when leaving that page if m.navIndex = 2 then m.livePage.active = false end if
' Show only the requested page for i = 0 to m.pages.count() - 1 m.pages[i].visible = (i = index) end for
m.navIndex = index updateNav()
' FIX 3: Set focus differently for each page type if index = 2 then ' Activate & focus the live video page m.livePage.active = true m.livePage.setFocus(true) else if index = 0 then ' For Home page, find a focusable element or set to nav if m.homePage.hasFocus() = false then ' Try to find a focusable element in home page homeContent = m.homePage.findNode("someFocusableElement") if homeContent <> invalid then homeContent.setFocus(true) else ' If no focusable element, focus the nav group m.top.findNode("navGroup").setFocus(true) end if end if else if index = 1 then ' For Blogs page, focus a blog item or nav blogContent = m.blogsPage.findNode("blogList") ' Adjust this to your actual blog list node if blogContent <> invalid then blogContent.setFocus(true) else m.top.findNode("navGroup").setFocus(true) end if else ' Fallback: focus the nav group m.top.findNode("navGroup").setFocus(true) end if end sub
' ── Called when LiveVideoPage fires requestClose ────────── sub onLiveClose() if m.livePage.requestClose = true and m.navIndex = 2 then showPage(0) end if end sub
' ── Remote-control key handling ─────────────────────────── function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if not press then return false
' FIX 4: Handle navigation only if focus is on the nav group ' or if we're in a state where we should handle page switching if key = "right" and m.navIndex < 2 then showPage(m.navIndex + 1) return true else if key = "left" and m.navIndex > 0 then showPage(m.navIndex - 1) return true else if key = "down" and m.navIndex = 1 then m.blogsScrollY = m.blogsScrollY - 130 if m.blogsScrollY < -620 then m.blogsScrollY = -620 m.blogsPage.scrollY = m.blogsScrollY return true else if key = "up" and m.navIndex = 1 then m.blogsScrollY = m.blogsScrollY + 130 if m.blogsScrollY > 0 then m.blogsScrollY = 0 m.blogsPage.scrollY = m.blogsScrollY return true end if
return false end function
